trial_type.Description: TI stimulation condition for this segment.

Levels.OFF: Sham: both channel pairs at 0 mA / 0 Hz.
Levels.1HZ: Active TI at 1 Hz envelope (2000 + 2001 Hz carriers).
Levels.5HZ: Active TI at 5 Hz envelope (2000 + 2005 Hz carriers).
Levels.BOUNDARY: Marker delimiting the overall stimulation period (STIM_START / STIM_STOP).

Levels.regular: Steady-state stimulation trial (no ramp, no refractory).
Levels.rampingUp: 5-second linear carrier-frequency ramp at the start of a new parameter block.
Levels.rampingDown: 5-second linear carrier-frequency ramp at the end of a parameter block.
Levels.refract: Refractory window adjacent to a ramping segment, excluded from primary analyses.

block.Description: Block index parsed from the marker label (e.g. 001 in '5HZ_001_003'). Zero for boundary markers.

trial.Description: Within-block trial index parsed from the marker label (e.g. 003 in '5HZ_001_003'). Zero for boundary markers.

value.Description: Original LSL marker string from the StimMarkers stream.
